creator: osa@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Could you please fix your MTA for accept requests from FreeBSD.ORG? 

<frederic.praca@freebsd-fr.org>: host away.niv2.com[77.72.88.8] said: 550 5.7.1 
ALIO2200: Unaccepted character set: .koi8-r. (in reply to end of DATA 
command) 

Thank you.
